## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or stack traces.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 / Windows 11]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.8]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 22.0.0]
- dipeen version / commit: [e.g. v0.1.0 or git SHA]
- Deployment: [Docker Compose / local dev]
- LLM provider: [e.g. Anthropic / Ollama]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or logs here.
